reasoning_content:
Now I understand the scoring system better. The test framework:
1. Calls `clang -cc1 -dump-tokens` on the source file to generate answer.txt
2. Runs our task1 program on the source file to generate output.txt
3. Compares the two outputs

The scoring is based on:
- Token type and value (60%)
- Location (30%)
- Unrelated characters (StartOfLine/LeadingSpace) (10%)

Let me rebuild and test again to see if my changes help.
